title: stack-control installation config
description: Wire format for .stack-control/config.yaml. The config's presence marks the installation root. Validation is enforced fail-loud in src/config/config-loader.ts (this schema documents the contract; the loader is the runtime oracle). Wire is snake_case; in-memory is camelCase.

version.description: Schema version; required positive integer. An unknown future version is a descriptive error, not a best-effort parse.

base_dir.description: Optional base for internal stores (backlog, program audit log); default ".stack-control". Must resolve within the installation root.

paths.description: Optional per-file location overrides; each relative-to-root (or absolute within root).

feature_audit_log_pattern.description: Per-feature audit-log pattern; MUST contain the literal {feature} placeholder.

journal.description: session-skills (011): the development journal (human doc); default <root>/DEVELOPMENT-NOTES.md. session-end appends, session-start reads the latest entry.

tooling_feedback.description: session-skills (011): the tooling-friction log (human doc); default <root>/tooling-feedback.md. session-end appends.

clone_scope.description: session-skills (011): the per-codebase clone-detection scope (a directory); default the installation root. session-end's advisory clone-snapshot scans this subtree.
